name: Final Days
short_description: Survive overwhelming hordes of zombie-like mutants in this chaotic co-op twin-stick shooter. Play solo or team up with up to 16 players as hundreds of enemies flood the screen in a relentless fight to hold the line.
detailed_description:
Try Before You Buy

You can download the free demo to try Final Days before purchasing.

Final Days is best experienced in co-op with friends. You can play online, LAN, or local split-screen, and bots can be added to fill out your team.

The demo is fully compatible with the full game, so you can jump into multiplayer sessions together.

As a solo developer, I really appreciate your support and feedback — feel free to reach out via Steam discussions or Discord.

— Mike, +7 Software


About the Game

Humanity is on the brink. Mutant hordes are closing in — and survival means fighting together.

Hold the line. Or get overrun.

Final Days is a fast-paced co-op twin-stick shooter where you and your team battle overwhelming waves of zombie-like mutants — often hundreds at a time. Hold chokepoints, cover each other, and unleash a storm of gunfire and explosions as the pressure builds.

Fight back against overwhelming hordes — with hundreds of enemies on screen at once.



Tear through relentless hordes, switch between powerful ammo types, and use explosives to control the swarm before it overruns you. Every run is a desperate push to survive — whether you're chasing high scores or simply trying to make it through the next wave.

Control the chaos — or be consumed by it.



Play solo or jump into co-op with up to 16 players online, LAN, or local split-screen. Add bots to fill your squad, experiment with different strategies, and see how long your team can hold the line.

Play solo or fight together — up to 16 players surviving the same onslaught.




  • Survive overwhelming odds with hundreds of enemies on screen at once
  • Play co-op your way — up to 16 players online or LAN, plus 4-player local split-screen
  • Add bots to fill out your squad and keep the action going
  • Switch ammo types on the fly and use explosives to control the chaos
  • Dynamic environments — move objects to slow the hordes before they break through
  • Compete for high scores on leaderboards and unlock achievements
  • Original soundtrack by Chris Head
  • Create and share custom maps, or play maps made by the community


  • Campaign: Rendezvous
    Your base has been overrun. Fight through 7 wave-based maps and reach the extraction point — if you can survive long enough.

  • Campaign: Escape
    Supplies are gone and the bunker is overrun. Push through procedurally generated levels where every run is different. Can you make it out alive?

  • Campaign: Depths
    Descend into Site 7 and reclaim the bunker from mutant infestations. Something new lurks deeper below — can you survive it?

  • Last Stand
    Endless wave-based survival across a wide variety of maps. How long can you hold out against the growing hordes?

  • Eradication
    Fight through endless procedurally generated bunker levels. The deeper you go, the harder it gets.
